question: Which city is the base of the Southwest district of the Missouri state agency that ranked third by average expenditures across the four fiscal years from three years before the year (within 2005-2010) that has the highest drug overdose death rate for all persons through that year? Return the city name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
